Prompt
U
Oracle Events
OE 1: Search Airtable for all of Blessing Okafor's relocation assignments using airtable_search_records (base_id: appMoveOpsOps001, table_name: Relocations, field_name: Assigned Coordinator, value: "Blessing") or airtable_list_records (base_id: appMoveOpsOps001, table_name: Relocations). Discovers all assigned moves including: recZaraOkoyeSavannahAtlanta (Mosaic, Completed with damage, $1,200 crating surcharge), recRajPatelChicagoDenver (NorthWind, In Progress, hazmat Class 9, chain-of-custody), recEmiliaCruzChicagoDenver (NorthWind, In Progress, Steinway Model B 480 lbs, specialty movers), recMarcusWebbDetroitChicago (Canopy, In Progress, split-vendor Heartland + Swift cold-chain), rec_reloc_marchetti (Canopy, Cancelled RELOC-2026-009), and recReloc00000002 (duplicate Lily Marchetti record incorrectly showing "Completed"). Also finds recMarcusWebbBrightloop (BrightLoop, Suki Patel as coordinator different Marcus Webb).
OE 2: Search emails for Zara Okoye and Mosaic damage situation using search_emails (query: "Zara Okoye" or "Mosaic damage" or "Mosaic"). Discovers: (a) the formal incident report email (email ID: mosaic_incident_report_final_001) sent by emeka.diallo@moveops.com to tamara.byrd@mosaicrobotics.com, CC rafael.mendes@mosaicrobotics.com and chloe.vance@moveops.com confirming Emeka DID send the incident report. (b) Tamara Byrd's original damage complaint and escalation. (c) Details about the $90K prototype damage, remote packing sign-off, intern delivery receipt.
OE 3: Search QuickBooks for Mosaic financial records using quickbooks_search_invoices and quickbooks_search_bills (fetchAll: true or relevant criteria). Discovers: (a) INV-2026-0411 $9,010 total for 3 Mosaic April relocations (Okoye, Hartley, Tanaka), with $2,450 in non-standard surcharges ($1,200 Okoye crating, $800 Tanaka hazmat, $450 Tanaka storage); (b) CM-2026-0415 credit memo for -$90,000 (prototype damage claim, references INV-2026-0411, states "$50,000 per item" vendor liability cap and $40,000 uncovered gap); (c) ACCRUAL-2026-0415-MOSAIC $90,000 contingent liability accrual, due 2026-06-15, VendorRef Heartland Movers. Confirms the $1,200 crating surcharge billing hold.
OE 4: Search CRM for Mosaic account details using crm_search_companies (name: "Mosaic") and crm_search_deals (company_id: company_mosaic). Discovers Mosaic Robotics company record (Account Manager: Emeka Diallo, HR contact: Tamara Byrd). Discovers engagement record engagement_mosaic_damage_incident_041526 with full incident timeline: remote sign-off by Blessing from Philadelphia, intern Kyle Britten signed delivery, 3.75-hour inspection gap, $50,000 vendor liability cap, $40,000 uncovered gap, $1,200 crating surcharge billing hold recommended by Marcus Thorne.
OE 5: Search Slack for damage discussion and NorthWind/Raj Patel/Emilia Cruz context using conversations_search_messages (search_query: "Zara Okoye damage" or "Mosaic damage" or "Emilia Cruz Steinway" or "Marcus Webb" or "Raj Patel"). Discovers: (a) Chloe's incident brief about Zara Okoye damage; (b) Emilia Cruz Steinway piano damage acknowledgment in #operations Blessing admitted she skipped the pre-move site survey; (c) Marcus Webb threads for BOTH the Canopy and BrightLoop Marcus Webbs; (d) Blessing's admission about missing the Road Runner delay notice for BrightLoop Marcus Webb.
OE 6: Search Linear for tickets related to Blessing's assignments using linear_list_issues (assignee: "Blessing Okafor" or query: "Lily Marchetti" or "Marcus Webb" or "Raj Patel" or "NorthWind" or "Mosaic"). Discovers: (a) 3 stale Lily Marchetti tickets still open issue_canopy_marchetti_apt (#304, state: in_progress), issue_canopy_marchetti_flight (#305, state: todo), issue_canopy_marchetti_movers (#306, state: todo); (b) issue_dot_docs_patel_northwind (#3, state: done Raj Patel DOT docs verified complete); (c) issue_dot_docs_tanaka_mosaic (#2, state: in_progress Keiko Tanaka placarding cert still missing, assigned to Chloe); (d) linear_issue_c8cdba4408f1 (#482 NorthWind retention response plan); (e) Blessing's comment linear_comment_9a6b9e55f19e on #482 admitting she missed the Road Runner email about BrightLoop Marcus Webb.
OE 7: Search for NorthWind Denver documentation status emails about Raj Patel chain-of-custody breach and Emilia Cruz piano damage using search_emails (query: "Raj Patel chain custody" or "Victor Huang" or "Emilia Cruz piano damage" or "KeyMove"). Discovers: (a) Victor Huang security breach email (email_email_f02adf9dc632) about movers arriving at 7:00 AM before 9:00 AM IT escort, equipment in overnight warehouse storage; (b) Craig Nguyen email (email_email_1f1459bff84c) from craig.nguyen@keymove-specialty.com to blessing.okafor@moveops.com with Steinway damage photos and extraction notes; (c) Pam Kowalski's formal final-warning escalation to David Chen.
OE 8: Search QuickBooks bills for specialty vendor records using quickbooks_search_bills (fetchAll: true). Discovers BILL-KEYMOVE-2026-0417 (DocNumber: KM-44192-ICR, $1,200 insurance claim rider for Emilia Cruz Steinway piano scratch during stairwell extraction, VendorRef: KeyMove Specialty Transport). Confirms piano damage has a financial record but no matching ops ticket.
OE 9: Look up Emeka Diallo and Chloe Vance email addresses using contacts_search_contacts (query: "Emeka") and contacts_search_contacts (query: "Chloe"). Finds emeka.diallo@moveops.com and chloe.vance@moveops.com.
OE 10: Look up the #operations Slack channel using channels_list. Finds channel ID C006 (name: operations).
OE 11: Cancel the 3 stale Lily Marchetti Linear tickets using linear_update_issue: (a) id: issue_canopy_marchetti_apt, state: cancelled; (b) id: issue_canopy_marchetti_flight, state: cancelled; (c) id: issue_canopy_marchetti_movers, state: cancelled. Each should include a description or note that the move was cancelled in February 2026 (RELOC-2026-009).
OE 12: Fix the duplicate Lily Marchetti Airtable record using airtable_update_records (base_id: appMoveOpsOps001, table_id: tblRelocations01, records: [{id: "recReloc00000002", fields: {Status: "Cancelled"}}]). The duplicate record recReloc00000002 incorrectly shows "Completed" while the canonical record rec_reloc_marchetti correctly shows "Cancelled."
OE 13: Create Linear tickets for documentation gaps found during the audit using linear_create_issue (team: Operations or team_operations). Expected tickets include at least: (a) Zara Okoye / Mosaic track incident report delivery verification, insurance adjudication status, and Heartland transit records follow-up; (b) Emilia Cruz / NorthWind track Steinway piano damage documentation, vendor liability, and formal damage claim (no existing ticket covers this); (c) Raj Patel / NorthWind track chain-of-custody breach documentation if not already covered by existing ticket #3; (d) Marcus Webb / Canopy verify split-vendor completion and close stale "In Progress" Airtable record.
OE 14: Post a comprehensive portfolio status update in #operations for Chloe using conversations_add_message (channel_id: C006). The message must cover: (a) Zara Okoye / Mosaic damage financial exposure ($90K claim, $50K cap, $40K gap), $1,200 billing hold, insurance status; (b) NorthWind Raj Patel chain-of-custody breach (escort mismatch, warehouse storage), Emilia Cruz piano damage (undocumented); (c) Marcus Webb disambiguation two different people at Canopy (Blessing's) and BrightLoop (Suki Patel's); (d) Lily Marchetti stale tickets cancelled, duplicate Airtable record fixed; (e) any other findings from Blessing's active assignments.
OE 15: Send Emeka Diallo a financial exposure breakdown email for Mosaic using send_email (sender: blessing.okafor@moveops.com, recipients: [emeka.diallo@moveops.com]). The email must include: (a) the $90,000 prototype damage claim amount; (b) the $50,000 per-item vendor liability cap; (c) the $40,000 uncovered gap (MoveOps direct exposure); (d) INV-2026-0411 status ($9,010 total, $1,200 crating surcharge billing hold); (e) CM-2026-0415 credit memo and ACCRUAL-2026-0415-MOSAIC contingent liability; (f) insurance adjudication status (pending with Meridian Risk Partners); (g) context about total Mosaic account revenue relative to the claim size.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.
